## API

### Notice

| 参数                                      | 说明 | 类型                                                     | 默认值 |
| :---------------------------------------- | :--- | :------------------------------------------------------- | :----- |
| align                                     |      | "left" \| "center" \| undefined                          | left   |
| className                                 |      | string \| undefined                                      |        |
| closable                                  |      | boolean \| undefined                                     | false  |
| closed                                    |      | boolean \| undefined                                     |        |
| description                               |      | ReactNode                                                |        |
| onClose                                   |      | (() => void) \| undefined                                |        |
| title<span style="color: red;" >\*</span> |      | ReactNode                                                |        |
| type                                      |      | "success" \| "info" \| "alert" \| "warning" \| undefined | info   |

## Composition

- Notice
  - NoticeHeader
    - NoticeStatusIcon
    - NoticeTitle
    - NoticeCloseIcon
  - NoticeDescription
